name: task-context
description: Return the full spec context that must be reviewed before implementing a task.

arguments.name: task_id
arguments.description: Stable task ID, for example T012.

instructions: Use traceability as the first lookup point.
When canonical-context.md exists, include it in must-read context and treat spec-canonical working sources as the first implementation context while preserving always-canonical external authorities.
Verify referenced requirements, acceptance criteria, design sections, verification expectations, durable targets, and open decisions against source artifacts.

When Agent Workbench or another repo-evidence provider misses expected docs, files, symbols, or contracts, do not treat that as absence evidence. Record the sparse provider result as a gap and direct-read linked artifacts, durable indexes, and targeted source inventories.
Report missing or stale matrix rows as gaps before implementation.
client_support_recovery: Use MCP task_context and traceability_lookup when available. If MCP tools are unavailable, read traceability.md and linked artifacts directly; do not call a traceability_lookup.py script.
